summary: Tested PVP Auction Bidding Battle fixes for lag, double-win bug, and round progression. Backend API tests (23/23 passed) verify all PVP endpoints including tap-state, finish-round, and WebSocket manager constants. Frontend UI testing confirmed: 1) Photo Battle Arena loads correctly, 2) Create Battle flow works with 5-photo selection, 3) Battle Lobby shows waiting state correctly, 4) Browse Games UI functional.
action_items: Real mobile device testing with video proof required (cannot be done in headless browser)
Two-player simultaneous WebSocket testing requires manual testing with two devices/browsers
critical_code_review_comments: pvp_game_websocket.py: DISCONNECT_FORFEIT_TIMEOUT correctly set to 20 seconds
pvp_game_websocket.py: AUCTION_ROUND_DURATION correctly set to 15 seconds
pvp_game_websocket.py: PVPGameRoom has player1_taps/player2_taps for persistence
pvp_game_websocket.py: round_winner_determined flag prevents double-win bug
pvp_game_websocket.py: Both-disconnect scenario correctly results in draw (no winner)
pvp_game_websocket.py: _persist_tap_state() saves to DB for polling fallback
pvp_game_websocket.py: _start_round() resets tap counts and round_winner_determined flag
TappingArena.jsx: API polling every 100ms for opponent tap updates
game_routes.py: finish-round endpoint is idempotent (returns cached result if already finished)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users with minted photos (user1 has 12 photos)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP Auction Bidding Battle system tested. Key fixes verified in code: 1) 20-second disconnect countdown with reconnection support, 2) Both-disconnect = draw (no winner), 3) round_winner_determined flag prevents double-win, 4) Tap state persisted to DB for polling sync, 5) Round start resets tap counts. Real two-player WebSocket testing requires manual testing with two devices.

GET /api/photo-game/pvp/tap-state/{sessi.details: Returns tap counts for both players

GET /api/photo-game/battle-photos.details: Returns user's minted photos sorted by value

player1_taps.details: Tracks player 1 tap count for persistence

player2_taps.details: Tracks player 2 tap count for persistence

photo_battle_arena.details: Main arena page loads with stats and options

browse_games.details: Photo selection UI for joining games

single_disconnect.details: 20-second countdown starts, broadcasts to connected player

note: Real two-player WebSocket testing and mobile device testing with video proof cannot be performed in headless browser environment. The code review confirms all fixes are implemented correctly. Manual testing with two devices/browsers recommended for full verification.
